public_assets.attribution: GOPRO_Large dataset by Seungjun Nah, Tae Hyun Kim, and Kyoung Mu Lee (SNU CVLab).
transformations: Both official inputs were downscaled with OpenCV INTER_AREA so their longest dimension is 384 px.
noisy.png is a deterministic RGB Gaussian-noise derivative of Flower_sharp1.png (seed 20260715, sigma 0.018).
public_assets.citation: Nah, Seungjun; Kim, Tae Hyun; Lee, Kyoung Mu. Deep Multi-Scale Convolutional Neural Network for Dynamic Scene Deblurring. CVPR 2017.

transformations: Reference and spatially varying depth-layer blur are generated procedurally.
noisy.png uses deterministic RGB Gaussian noise (seed 20260715, sigma 0.025).
